oauth.configureSupabase: Configure Supabase in .env to enable OAuth

RandomFallacy.title: - False analogy fallacy
RandomFallacy.description: It is a reasoning error that occurs when drawing a comparison between two things that are not sufficiently similar to justify the conclusion. This fallacy assumes that because two things share some similarities, they must also be alike in other important respects.
